envelope_defaults.human_readable_summary: Governance rules are canonical, RULE-20-protected entitlement-governance separation discipline. They enforce: billing entitles availability; Foundation governance authorizes activation. Customers should not pay extra just to have memory be safe.
envelope_defaults.model_usage_notes: These rules are absolute. Treat them as RULE-20-protected. Never relax. Never silently fold them into commercial pressure.

items.name: Entitlement is not authority
items.description: Entitlement makes a capability available. Foundation governance authorizes activation. Billing never overrides governance.
items.human_readable_summary: Billing says what the organization has purchased. Governance says what the system may safely do.
items.model_usage_notes: Never treat a billing entitlement as authority. Always require governance authorization for activation.

items.name: Billing does not override Foundation governance
items.description: Foundation governance (RULE 0 sovereignty, RULE 4 audit, RULE 10 soft-delete, RULE 16 no-console, RULE 20 protection, RULE 21 research) is never bypassed by commercial tier.
items.human_readable_summary: Foundation governance is absolute. Premium plans do not buy governance relaxation.
items.model_usage_notes: Higher commercial tier does not weaken governance.
items.governance_notes: Every plan tier inherits all Foundation governance RULES.
items.billing_notes: No plan tier opts out of Foundation governance.

items.name: Connector pack does not activate connector
items.description: Connector pack entitlement makes connectors available. Connector activation still requires Foundation governance + map-region approval + per-connector RULE 21 research arc.
items.human_readable_summary: Billing may entitle a connector pack; governance still authorizes connector activation.
items.model_usage_notes: Never treat connector pack entitlement as activation.
items.governance_notes: Connector pack entitlement is necessary but not sufficient for activation.
items.billing_notes: Pack purchase does not activate any connector.

items.name: Workflow pack does not authorize execution
items.description: Workflow pack entitlement makes execution available. Execution still requires Foundation governance + per-call approval per ADR-0081 Stage 3+.
items.model_usage_notes: Pack purchase does not authorize execution.
items.governance_notes: Execution requires per-call governance approval; dual-control for risky writes.
items.billing_notes: Pack purchase does not authorize execution.

items.name: DMW baseline included for trust
items.description: The Memory Wallet is foundational trust infrastructure. Every plan includes enough DMW capability for every Digital Twin to remember safely.
items.human_readable_summary: The DMW is not a luxury add-on. The Memory Wallet is foundational trust infrastructure. Base Otzar must include enough DMW capability for every Digital Twin to remember safely.
items.model_usage_notes: Customers should not pay extra just to have memory be safe.
items.governance_notes: DMW baseline safety is RULE-20-protected. Never relax.
items.billing_notes: DMW baseline is included in every plan, including Starter / Pilot.

items.name: Advanced DMW governance is premium, not basic safety
items.description: Advanced memory governance (custom retention, regulated deletion variants, lawful-basis composition) can be premium. Basic memory safety cannot.
items.human_readable_summary: Advanced memory governance can be premium; basic memory safety cannot.
items.model_usage_notes: Premium pack adds advanced features; baseline safety is unchanged.
items.billing_notes: Advanced DMW pack adds; never subtracts baseline.

items.name: Downgrade preserves audit and retention
items.description: Downgrades may disable new premium actions but must never delete audit history, violate retention, or break evidence integrity.
items.human_readable_summary: Downgrades may disable new premium actions but must never delete audit history, violate retention, or break evidence integrity.
items.governance_notes: Audit + retention + evidence integrity are absolute through every downgrade.
items.billing_notes: Downgrade halts new spend; never erases past evidence.

items.name: Non-payment disables new premium actions only
items.description: Non-payment may pause new premium actions but must never delete history, violate retention, break offboarding, or close legal-window exports.
items.human_readable_summary: Non-payment pauses new premium actions only; never erases history or breaks safety.
items.model_usage_notes: Non-payment is a commercial event, not a data event.
items.governance_notes: Grace + cancellation windows preserve all safety invariants.
items.billing_notes: Non-payment is governed by grace policy; data safety preserved.

items.name: Basic security is not unsafe paywalled
items.description: Foundation security baseline (audit chain integrity, no-leak guards, no-console, DMW baseline safety, same-org boundary, cross-tenant isolation) is included in every plan.
items.human_readable_summary: Foundation security baseline is never unsafe paywalled.
items.model_usage_notes: Security baseline ships with every plan.

items.name: Same-org boundary is never weakened
items.description: Same-org boundary + cross-tenant isolation are absolute regardless of plan tier or commercial pressure.
items.billing_notes: No commercial structure weakens cross-tenant boundary.

items.name: Map-region approval required
items.description: Per ADR-0082 Amendment 1 cartographer doctrine: Foundation authorizes capability only inside approved map boundaries.
items.human_readable_summary: Dandelion maps the territory; admins approve the map; Foundation governs what can happen inside the map.
items.model_usage_notes: Map-region approval is stronger than entitlement alone.
items.billing_notes: Entitlement does not pre-approve map regions.

items.name: Admin policy approval required for activation
items.description: Activation of any capability pack / connector / workflow / Dandelion region requires admin policy approval.
items.governance_notes: Admin Twin recommends; never activates autonomously.
items.billing_notes: Pack purchase requires admin activation step.

items.name: Dual-control for risky writes
items.description: Per ADR-0026, risky writes (money-moving, legal-effect, governance-modifying) require dual-control regardless of plan tier.
items.model_usage_notes: Dual-control is non-negotiable for risky writes.
items.governance_notes: Risky-write set is governance-defined; not commercial-defined.
items.billing_notes: No plan tier removes dual-control for risky writes.

items.name: No employee scoring
items.description: No plan / pack / connector / capability surfaces employee scoring. Forbidden inference per RULE-20 protection.
items.human_readable_summary: No employee scoring at any tier.
items.billing_notes: No commercial tier unlocks employee scoring.

items.name: No manager surveillance
items.description: No plan / pack / connector / capability surfaces manager surveillance of employees. Forbidden inference per RULE-20 protection.
items.human_readable_summary: No manager surveillance at any tier.
items.billing_notes: No commercial tier unlocks manager surveillance.

items.name: No sensitive-attribute inference
items.description: No plan / pack / connector / capability surfaces sensitive-attribute inference (psychological profile, protected attribute, behavior profile).
items.human_readable_summary: No sensitive-attribute inference at any tier.
items.billing_notes: No commercial tier unlocks sensitive-attribute inference.

items.name: No regulator approval claims
items.description: Per ADR-0070, never claim regulator approval, guaranteed compliance, or absence of fine risk.
items.human_readable_summary: Never claim regulator approval, guaranteed compliance, or no fine risk.
items.model_usage_notes: Examination-ready substrate is delivered; final regulator acceptance is the regulator's call.
items.billing_notes: No commercial structure permits regulator-approval claim.

items.name: No guaranteed compliance claims
items.description: Per ADR-0070, never claim guaranteed compliance for any plan / pack / capability.
items.model_usage_notes: Examination-ready substrate is delivered; compliance is governance + operational practice combined.
items.billing_notes: No commercial structure permits guaranteed-compliance claim.

non_paywallable_safety_rules.name: Historical audit records
non_paywallable_safety_rules.description: Historical audit records are never deleted, never paywalled, never reduced by downgrade. Per RULE 10 + ADR-0002 BEFORE DELETE trigger.
non_paywallable_safety_rules.human_readable_summary: Historical audit records are never deleted, paywalled, or reduced by downgrade.
non_paywallable_safety_rules.model_usage_notes: Audit history is append-only across every plan tier.
non_paywallable_safety_rules.governance_notes: BEFORE DELETE trigger enforces this at the database level.

non_paywallable_safety_rules.name: Legally required retention
non_paywallable_safety_rules.description: Legally required retention is preserved across every plan tier and through every downgrade / non-payment / cancellation.
non_paywallable_safety_rules.human_readable_summary: Legal retention is never reduced by commercial events.
non_paywallable_safety_rules.governance_notes: Retention extension via add-on; retention reduction never.

non_paywallable_safety_rules.name: Audit chain integrity
non_paywallable_safety_rules.description: Audit chain integrity (SHA-256 hash chain + BEFORE DELETE trigger + verify-chain) is preserved across every plan tier.
non_paywallable_safety_rules.human_readable_summary: Audit chain integrity is absolute and never paywalled.
non_paywallable_safety_rules.model_usage_notes: Verify-chain is always available; advanced cross-scope verify is a pack feature, but caller's own verify-chain is baseline.
non_paywallable_safety_rules.governance_notes: Integrity is technical; tiering does not relax integrity.

non_paywallable_safety_rules.name: Basic DMW memory safety
non_paywallable_safety_rules.description: Baseline DMW memory safety (RULE 0 sovereignty, scope discipline, revocability, soft-delete) is included in every plan.
non_paywallable_safety_rules.human_readable_summary: Basic memory safety is never paywalled. Customers should not pay extra just to have memory be safe.
non_paywallable_safety_rules.model_usage_notes: Baseline safety is unchanged across tiers.
non_paywallable_safety_rules.governance_notes: RULE 0 sovereignty + revocability + soft-delete are absolute.

non_paywallable_safety_rules.name: Basic security controls
non_paywallable_safety_rules.description: Foundation security baseline (no-leak guards, no-console anchor, secret isolation, same-org boundary, cross-tenant isolation, HMAC verifier) is included in every plan.
non_paywallable_safety_rules.human_readable_summary: Foundation security baseline is never paywalled.
non_paywallable_safety_rules.model_usage_notes: Security baseline ships with every plan.

non_paywallable_safety_rules.name: User offboarding safety
non_paywallable_safety_rules.description: User offboarding (seat removal, role change, departure) preserves audit + revocation + memory boundaries.
non_paywallable_safety_rules.governance_notes: Offboarding is governance-bound; never affected by commercial event.

non_paywallable_safety_rules.name: Ability to disconnect or revoke connectors
non_paywallable_safety_rules.description: Ability to disconnect or revoke connectors is always available regardless of plan tier or commercial state.
non_paywallable_safety_rules.human_readable_summary: Connector disconnect / revoke is never paywalled.

non_paywallable_safety_rules.name: Compliance / audit export during grace or legal window
non_paywallable_safety_rules.description: Audit + compliance export during the grace + legal window is available regardless of commercial state.
non_paywallable_safety_rules.human_readable_summary: Legal-window audit export is never paywalled.

non_paywallable_safety_rules.name: Ability to disable risky automation or connectors
non_paywallable_safety_rules.description: Admin kill-switch for risky automation / connector activity is always available.
non_paywallable_safety_rules.governance_notes: Per ADR-0050 break-glass + per-connector admin kill-switch per ADR-0084.

non_paywallable_safety_rules.name: Preserving data boundaries
non_paywallable_safety_rules.description: Data boundaries (tenant, role, scope, engagement) are absolute regardless of commercial state.

non_paywallable_safety_rules.name: Same-org boundary
non_paywallable_safety_rules.description: Same-org boundary is absolute regardless of commercial state.

non_paywallable_safety_rules.name: Cross-tenant isolation
non_paywallable_safety_rules.description: Cross-tenant isolation is absolute regardless of commercial state.

non_paywallable_safety_rules.name: Legal hold preservation
non_paywallable_safety_rules.description: Legal hold preservation is absolute regardless of commercial state.
non_paywallable_safety_rules.human_readable_summary: Legal hold is never broken by commercial events.

billing_admin_permission_profile.name: Billing Admin Permission Profile
billing_admin_permission_profile.description: Billing Admin role profile per ADR-0083 Amendment 1 §9.7. Billing Admin governs commercial state (plan / seats / packs / usage cap review) without acquiring Foundation governance authority for activation, connector approval, workflow execution, or DMW policy modification.
billing_admin_permission_profile.human_readable_summary: Billing Admin role. Owns commercial state. Never overrides Foundation governance, connector activation, workflow execution, or DMW policy.
billing_admin_permission_profile.model_usage_notes: Billing Admin is distinct from Otzar Administrator. Activation authority belongs to Otzar Administrator; commercial authority belongs to Billing Admin. Same person may hold both with separate audit lineage.
billing_admin_permission_profile.governance_notes: Billing Admin scope is commercial. Activation scope is admin. Separation prevents commercial-pressure activation.
billing_admin_permission_profile.billing_notes: Billing Admin can change plan / add seats / activate connector pack entitlement / view usage. Cannot override governance.
audit_expectations: future B3+ runtime emits BILLING_* discriminators via ADMIN_ACTION
